tasks.title: Create UploadController with chunked endpoint
details: Add POST /api/v1/uploads/init endpoint to create upload session
Add PUT /api/v1/uploads/:sessionId/chunk endpoint for chunk delivery
Add POST /api/v1/uploads/:sessionId/complete to finalize upload
Validate chunk index continuity (reject gaps or duplicates)
Return upload session metadata: sessionId, totalChunks, receivedChunks, status

tasks.title: Add UploadSession entity to database
details: Create UploadSessions table: id, userId, fileName, fileSize, mimeType, totalChunks, status, createdAt, completedAt
Add UploadChunk table: id, sessionId, chunkIndex, checksum, storagePath
Add Entity Framework migration with up/down methods
Add unique constraint on (sessionId, chunkIndex) to prevent duplicates

tasks.title: Implement chunk assembly worker
details: Background job triggered when all chunks received (status → Assembling)
Read chunks in order, verify SHA-256 checksum per chunk
Concatenate to final storage path (S3-compatible)
On failure: retry up to 3 times, then mark session as Failed
On success: update status to Completed, set completedAt timestamp

tasks.title: Add SignalR hub for real-time progress
details: Create UploadProgressHub with SubscribeToSession(sessionId) method
Broadcast progress events: ChunkReceived, AssemblyStarted, UploadCompleted, UploadFailed
Add rate-limited progress updates (throttle to 1 per second per session)
Register hub in startup DI container

tasks.title: Create FileUploader.tsx component
details: Drag-and-drop zone with file type validation (accept prop)
Chunk files into 5MB pieces using FileReader.slice()
Show progress bar per file using SignalR subscription
Retry failed chunks automatically (max 2 retries)
Display upload status badges: Uploading / Assembling / Completed / Failed

tasks.title: Add upload history table to dashboard
details: Fetch uploads from GET /api/v1/uploads?page=1&limit=20
Render table columns: FileName, Size, Status, Date
Add status filter dropdown (All / Completed / Failed / In Progress)
Add click-to-download action on completed rows
Empty state illustration when no uploads exist

tasks.title: Write integration tests for chunked upload flow
details: Test full upload cycle: init → upload chunks → complete → verify file
Test duplicate chunk rejection returns 409 Conflict
Test gap detection returns 400 with missing chunk index
Test assembly failure triggers retry and eventually marks Failed
Test concurrent uploads to same session are serialized
